rationale: Reconciling contradictory field updates needs judgment to resolve which source wins; review_mode=always.
Batch conflict resolution across fields requires moderate judgment per conflict pair; review_mode=always.
Presenting CRM fix suggestions for approval needs clarity and editorial framing; review_mode=always.
Triage with memorized category preferences adds adaptive judgment beyond simple bucketing; review_mode=always.
Recipient-specific draft composition with style-profile learning requires tone and editorial judgment.
Three-route review logic (fast-track, dedup merge, low-confidence) needs multi-path judgment; review_mode=always.
Accept/reject triage against memory-trained weights is mechanical binary routing with no prose generation.
Post-mortem generation with 90-day pattern detection requires synthesis and structured narrative writing.
Severity-tiered escalation with whitelist and memory requires moderate judgment on anomaly classification.
Rating capture (1-4) and memory-tuned calibration update is deterministic form processing, no synthesis.
Accept/reject triage with memory-trained relevance scoring is mechanical binary routing per candidate.
Feedback loop that iteratively sharpens proposal quality requires reflective judgment on prior reviews.
Webhook-driven envelope processing with spreadsheet upsert is deterministic event routing and data sync.
Calendar-to-spreadsheet mirroring with create/update/cancel diff is mechanical data sync, no judgment.
Schema introspection and change notification is deterministic structural comparison with no synthesis.
Cross-article contradiction detection over a full wiki requires multi-source synthesis; review_mode=always.
Lint across memories, vector KBs, and vaults with severity tagging needs moderate analytical judgment.
Orphan detection plus taxonomy suggestions requires light editorial/structural reasoning beyond raw counts.
Ambiguous feedback routed via emoji reactions is simple classification into a fixed set of buckets.
Real-time triage into Linear issues with dedup requires moderate judgment on ticket equivalence.
Weekly trend digest with category counts and top-theme extraction needs light synthesis and prose.
Daily metrics summary with fixed fields (rates, counts, trend) is structured templated reporting.
Confidence-gated triage with knowledge-gap detection across three routes needs moderate routing judgment.
Acknowledge customer + gap outline + frequency tracking + escalation requires editorial and analytical work.
KB update after completed review and messaging shoutouts are deterministic close-the-loop actions.
Rotation-based assignment with email reminders follows explicit rules; no prose judgment needed.
Staged reminder escalation (gentle→urgent→manager) is threshold-driven dispatch with templated messages.
Evidence-based priority triage with KB ticket creation requires judgment on severity and evidence weight.
Three-stage SLA escalation by time threshold is deterministic rule-based dispatch with state updates.
HTML digest with trend analysis and recommendations for support lead needs synthesis and prose writing.
Pattern enrichment on SLA breaches plus tier-based severity needs moderate analytical reasoning.
Auto-learning from solved tickets to grow KB requires extracting and synthesizing resolution knowledge.
Single warning per threshold crossing with time-remaining context is deterministic threshold alerting.
Sentiment + urgency triage with KB-backed auto-suggestion needs multi-signal moderate judgment.
Consolidated personal briefing across research + goals + actions requires synthesis and prioritization.
Goal retrospective + idea triage + decision surfacing requires reflective multi-domain judgment; review_mode=always.
Morning meeting-day overview email is a fixed-format digest from calendar data, fully templated.
Nightly digest of the day's captures is a straightforward aggregation and format pass, no synthesis.
